NEUVILLETTE_POWER_SOURCEWATER_DROPLET.de: A condensed droplet of Hydro authority.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_SURGE_POWER.title: Surge
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_SURGE_POWER.descriptio: At the end of combat, lose this much HP, but not below 50% of your Max HP.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_ORATRICE_POWER.title: Oratrice
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_ORATRICE_POWER.descrip: When this reaches 100, create a Final Judgment in your hand and lose 100.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_TIDES_POWER.title: Tides
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_TIDES_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you play Equitable Judgment, heal this much and gain that much Surge.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_LIVING_WATER_POWER.des: Certain effects scale from this amount.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_CONVERGING_TIDES_POWER: Whenever you play Equitable Judgment, draw card(s).
Whenever you play Equitable Judgment, draw {Amount} card(s).
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_PUBLIC_OPINION_POWER.d: This turn, whenever another player plays an Attack, gain 5 Oratrice. Whenever another player plays a Skill, lose 5 Oratrice.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_WATER_TASTING_POWER.de: At the end of combat, gain Max HP, then remove this.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_WATER_TASTING_POWER.sm: At the end of combat, gain {Amount} Max HP, then remove this.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_NO_RETRIAL_POWER.title: No Retrial
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_NO_RETRIAL_POWER.descr: Whenever you lose HP, gain 1 Buffer, then lose 1 stack of this.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_CONTEMPT_OF_COURT_POWE: Whenever this creature gains Sourcewater Droplet, it loses HP equal to this amount. At end of turn, reduce this by 1.
At the start of your next turn, heal and gain Surge equal to this amount plus your Living Water.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_PLUIE_SUR_LA_VILLE_POW: You have 1 additional Max Energy. At the start of your turn, lose 2 HP.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_SIN_UPON_SIN_POWER.des: This turn, whenever the applier gains Sourcewater Droplet, apply Contempt of Court equal to this amount.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_ASSIST_ARREST_POWER.de: Whenever you heal, Summon that much Osty.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_SIPHON_PRIMORDIAL_SEA_: At the start of your turn, if you have at least Sourcewater Droplet, remove them and gain 2 Strength.
At the start of your turn, if you have at least {Amount} Sourcewater Droplet, remove them and gain 2 Strength.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_AGILITY_POWER.title: Agility
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_AGILITY_POWER.descript: The next time you play a Skill that gains Block, it gains additional Block equal to this amount, then lose that much Agility.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_TEMPORARY_MAX_HP_POWER: At the end of combat, lose this much Max HP.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_LEVIATHAN_FORM_POWER.d: Your HP is set to an effectively infinite amount. At the start of your turn, restore your original HP, then reduce this. When it expires, reapply it.
At the end of combat, obtain a relic, a potion, 20 Gold, and 3 Max HP, then remove Dragon Treasure from your deck.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_GOOD_MORNING_POWER.des: At the start of your turn, add Melusine Sticker card(s) to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_GOOD_MORNING_POWER.sma: At the start of your turn, add {Amount} Melusine Sticker card(s) to your hand.
Every 6 Melusine Sticker cards you play, add a Sigewinne Sticker to your hand.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_COURT_SESSION_POWER.de: The next {Amount} card(s) you play will be [gold]Submitted[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_COURT_SESSION_POWER.sm: The next {Amount} card(s) you play will be [gold]Submitted[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_WATER_TIGHT_POWER.desc: At end of your turn, gain {Amount} Block for each [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] you have.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_WATER_TIGHT_POWER.smar: At end of your turn, gain {Amount} Block for each [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] you have.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_LAMINAR_FLOW_POWER.des: After playing your first Attack card each turn, consume {Amount} [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to play it again.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_BREATH_POWER.title: Breath
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_BREATH_POWER.descripti: Whenever you gain HP, deal that much damage to ALL enemies.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_COURT_ARGUMENT_POWER.d: Your [gold]Vigor[/gold] and [gold]Agility[/gold] effects trigger {Amount} more times before being removed.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_DEFENSE_POWER.title: Defense
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_DEFENSE_POWER.descript: When your [gold]Vigor[/gold] is removed, regain same amount.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_PROSECUTION_POWER.desc: When your [gold]Agility[/gold] is removed, regain same amount.
At end of combat, remove this card and {Cards:diff()} other card(s) from your deck.
At end of combat, remove this card and {Cards} other card(s) from your deck.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_PAST_DRACONIC_GLORIES_: Your [blue]Equitable Judgment[/blue] deals double damage and causes you to lose additional HP when played.
Your [blue]Equitable Judgment[/blue] deals [blue]{DamageMultiplier}[/blue]x additional damage and causes you to lose [red]{AdditionalHpLoss}[/red] additional HP when played.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_BEAST_OF_STARS_POWER.d: After losing HP, heal [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of the HP lost, then increase this effect by 10%.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_BEAST_OF_STARS_POWER.s: After losing HP, heal [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of the HP lost, then increase this effect by 10%.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_DEVOUR_POWER.title: Devour
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_DEVOUR_POWER.descripti: After you play an Attack, gain Vigor equal to [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of the damage dealt.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_DEVOUR_POWER.smartDesc: After you play an Attack, gain Vigor equal to [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of the damage dealt.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_APPETITE_POWER.title: Appetite
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_APPETITE_POWER.descrip: At the start of your turn, afflict 3 random cards in your hand with [gold]Craving[/gold]. At the end of your turn, Exhaust cards in your hand with [gold]Craving[/gold] and add that many Rifts.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_PHANTOM_POWER.title: Phantom
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_PHANTOM_POWER.descript: After losing all Block, return from the belly of the whale.
